meta.name: Databricks
meta.description: Databricks is the Data and AI company. Founded in 2013 by the original creators of Apache Spark, Delta Lake and MLflow, it provides a unified, open lakehouse platform for data engineering, data science, machine learning and analytics, trusted by thousands of organizations worldwide.

principles: Engineered clarity: a precise, technical system that reads as confident and unfussy.
Flat and deliberate: full-bleed solid-colour section bands alternating dark navy and light cream — no gradients, no background imagery.
Let structure carry the message: solid-colour rectangular tiles stand in for decorative photography in content grids.
One signature lift: light cards float off dark bands on a soft, multi-layer diffuse shadow — the single permitted depth cue.
Accent with intent: the red-orange accent marks CTAs, highlights and icon accents only, never as a fill for large areas.
This is a recovered, public-evidence reconstruction for internal Stromy showcase use — never represented as an official Databricks document.
signatureElements: Full-bleed flat-colour section bands, alternating dark navy (#1B3139) and light cream (#F9F7F4)
Solid-colour rectangular content tiles (accent-orange, dark-navy) used as graphic blocks in place of photography
Signature floating card: light card lifted off a dark band by a soft, multi-layer diffuse shadow
Two icon families — thin-stroke cool grey-blue line icons and bolder solid-fill navy/accent illustrative shapes
DM Sans throughout for heading and body; DM Mono for code
antiPatterns: Gradient backgrounds or gradient fills (the site is deliberately flat)
Background photography or texture behind text
Using the red-orange accent as a large-area fill rather than an accent
Drop shadows everywhere — depth is reserved for the single floating-card lift

evidence.note: Recovered from databricks.com homepage DOM sweep + press kit, 2026-07-06 (ORG-PLAN-071). Envelope fields derived from the same evidence that produced expression.visual_grammar; awaiting operator brand-smell sign-off to flip status→approved.
